campaignIdea: Use the Grok co-host setup to show the world Recall.
draftCopy: I gave public @grok my Recall memory. Now it can answer from all my private Grok, Claude, ChatGPT, and local model sessions directly on X. Recall turns every model into a self-improving specialist.
constraints: Do not claim public @grok can access private Recall unless a real bridge exists.
Distinguish current CLI/MCP/manual bridge capability from roadmap automation.
Turn abstract memory philosophy into a visible proof moment.
